gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 requested aligning the governance directory scanner with checkpoint generated-directory handling and exercising checkpoint paths through repository hygiene evaluation; both fixes were applied, verification was rerun, and the reviewer approved.
verification: poetry run pytest tests/test_repository_hygiene.py tests/test_project_governance.py -q -> 47 passed
what_changed: Rejected tracked or untracked notebook checkpoint artifacts in repository hygiene evidence.
Aligned the governance directory scanner so checkpoint folders do not require README files.
Documented checkpoint handling in the repository hygiene README section.
why: Databricks and Jupyter exploratory runs can generate checkpoint folders; Cachet release hygiene should reject those generated artifacts while avoiding false directory-documentation failures.
